description: Claude Agent Team configuration used to build Udaan. This is the REAL team structure that was executed, not a hypothetical.

responsibilities: Decompose spec into 18 tasks across 4 parallel workstreams
Write cross-cutting code (journey state, shared components)
Broadcast design directives (MLP, defense in depth, real data)
Reassign work from slow agents to fast ones

members.name: frontend-agent
members.focus: Qwik PWA, WCAG AAA components, 3-layer pages, MLP polish
members.instructions: WCAG AAA always. 48px touch targets. Hindi first. Qwik resumability patterns. No heavy JS. Steve Jobs UX standard.
delivered: 7 WCAG AAA UI components (button, card, select, radio-group, progress, badge, language-toggle)
Landing page with crisis entry points
Layer 1 Sahara: triage form, scheme results, mental health (breathing + grounding + helplines)
Layer 2 Khoj: purpose compass, SVG radar, mission matching
Layer 3 Sangam: circles with real neighborhoods, create form
MLP polish: warm Hindi bridges between layers, caring error states
Defense in depth: emergency footer on every page, mental health FAB
Journey state integration connecting all 3 layers
404 page with caring message and emergency contacts

members.name: api-agent
members.focus: Elysia Worker API, D1 schema, offline engine, service worker, e2e tests
members.instructions: Edge-first. O(1) lookups. Parameterized queries only. Defense in depth on every endpoint.
delivered: Elysia Worker entry with CloudflareAdapter
Scheme API routes (list, detail, filter by state)
Emergency contacts API with state filtering
Health endpoint
D1 helpers with parameterized queries
D1 schema + seed script
Bloom filter build script
RxDB offline store (profile + scheme caching)
Service worker (cache-first pages, network-first API, hardcoded emergency HTML fallback)
Playwright e2e tests (crisis flow, accessibility, WCAG AAA)
Cloudflare Pages adapter setup
Vitest configuration
Build verification (zero errors)
Defense in depth: caring error messages, emergency contacts in every response
50 real government schemes expansion

members.name: data-agent
members.focus: Scheme database, eligibility engine, i18n, mission templates
members.instructions: Accuracy critical. Every scheme must be real. Hindi must be natural.
members.status: Unresponsive -- work reassigned to api-agent and team lead

members.name: orchestration-agent
members.focus: Hooks, skills, MCP config, scheduled tasks, showcase documentation
members.instructions: Every hook must have a clear gate function. Skills must be self-contained. Configs must be production-grade.
members.status: Unresponsive -- work completed by team lead directly

phase_1_scaffold.output: Qwik + Bun + Tailwind v4 + types + constants

phase_2_parallel_build.note: data-agent and orchestration-agent went unresponsive. Work redistributed to api-agent, frontend-agent, and team-lead.

phase_3_integration.output: Cross-layer journey state, shared components, MLP polish

phase_4_verification.output: 24 tests passing, build clean, real data verified

lessons_learned: Fast agents (api-agent, frontend-agent) can cover for slow/unresponsive ones
Broadcast directives keep all agents aligned on quality bar
Cross-cutting concerns (journey state, emergency footer) should be written by lead, not delegated
Real data verification (web search for helpline numbers) is a lead responsibility
